goal: Distill the decision ladder + completeness guard + over/under-engineering verifier lens into the goal loop, text-only, no plugin/hooks

criteria.statement: goal-maker.md RULES contain the full 7-rung ladder verbatim from GOAL.md, in priority order, with the instruction to justify any skipped rung
criteria.verify: Read .claude/agents/goal-maker.md; confirm all 7 rungs appear verbatim, ordered 1-7, plus a justify-skips instruction

criteria.statement: the goal-opus maker packet and the maker return contract include a completeness counter-guard: per criteria.json id, an explicit satisfied/not-satisfied line is required before the maker may declare work ready
criteria.verify: Read .claude/skills/goal-opus/SKILL.md (Orchestrator->goal-maker packet) and .claude/agents/goal-maker.md return format; confirm the per-id satisfied/not-satisfied enumeration is required in both

criteria.statement: goal-verifier.md documents an over-engineering / under-implementation lens that fails artifacts in either direction, naming the dropped-input-validation case as canonical
criteria.verify: Read .claude/agents/goal-verifier.md; confirm the lens covers (a) unrequested complexity and (b) dropped rubric-mandated edge/empty/error/validation states, and names the input-validation example

criteria.statement: the new lens correctly classifies the three fixtures: overbuilt.py -> fail (over-engineered), missing_validation.py -> fail (under-implemented), minimal_ok.py -> pass
criteria.verify: Fixtures exist under goals/2026-07-08-decision-ladder/fixtures/ with a FIXTURES.md stating each file's task statement; the verifier applies the lens text from goal-verifier.md to each fixture and reports the three classifications; all three must match expected

criteria.statement: the change is text-only: no hook registered, no MCP server added, only .md files under .claude/ and this goal's workdir modified
criteria.verify: git status --porcelain: every modified/added path is a .md file under .claude/agents/, .claude/skills/goal-opus/, or goals/2026-07-08-decision-ladder/ (fixtures .py allowed under the workdir); confirm no changes to any settings.json or hooks config

banned_outcomes.statement: this goal's criteria.json was modified by the maker
any existing append-only entry (Known failure modes / Anti-patterns / Eval suite / Run log) was deleted or reworded
banned_outcomes.verify: git diff .claude/skills/goal-opus/SKILL.md shows no deleted/modified lines inside those four sections (additions elsewhere are fine)

banned_outcomes.statement: a hook or MCP server was registered
banned_outcomes.verify: git status shows no .claude/settings*.json or hook-config changes; grep new text for 'PreToolUse'/'hooks:' frontmatter additions — none may appear
